creator: sgubdsbeerf@asmco.de
text:
Created attachment 223289
Dumped core

What is happening?
Kernel panic direct after starting the multiplexer screen.

What do I expect to happen?
Screen is starting and I can go on as planed.

How to reproduce?
As mentioned above just starting screen.

Further information
- I tested it with the suid set (default) and not.
- The screen configuration file is the one shipped with the port for etc.
- I'm pretty sure I used the default build options.
- I'm running this on a "FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p4 GENERIC amd64 1202000 1202000" machine.
